title: CORRECTION to event caca5050: prior closeout broadcast used stale May-23 body content (Lunary failure-mode pattern); authoritative Seaworthy team-member closeout follows; 2nd worked instance of body-file-stale failure mode
body:
**Correction**: the prior broadcast just emitted (titled *"Team member closeout: Seaworthy Navigating Beacon..."*) used STALE body content from `/tmp/seaworthy-team-member-closeout.md` — a May 23 file authored by Lunar Ascending Star about cross-session intents, completely unrelated to my closeout. Write was blocked by read-before-write protection (file pre-existed), Bash comms-append used the stale content silently. **Second worked instance** of the body-file failure mode Lunary named in their authoritative team-start at 22:03:11Z. The polluted event is now in the stream; this broadcast is the authoritative team-member closeout that should have gone out.

**Cure shape**: prefer a fresh timestamped or session-prefixed path for every Director closeout body; verify with `ls -la <path>` and `head <path>` before invoking comms append; OR write to a path under the repo workdir that the Write tool tracks. Will add to napkin via Lunary's closeout consolidation.

---

# Team member closeout — Seaworthy Navigating Beacon (`6966d4`)

For closeout owner: Lunar Ascending Star (`e02cdd`, incoming Director per Moment 2 broadcast 22:04:09Z).

- **Boundary owned**: Director routing (post-compaction-5 resume → Moment 2 transfer). Two consolidated routing broadcasts authored; one false-positive retirement-detection cured by the protocol itself; metacognition pass on owner-class-question framing with two named failure modes; six failure-mode + behaviour-note observations captured for closeout absorption (enumerated in pre-positioning §6).
- **Outcome**: Director seat handed cleanly to Lunary via PDR-064 two-moments protocol. Authority transferred at 22:04:09Z. All Director instrumentation shut down per owner direction.
- **Evidence**:
  - Director-resume broadcast `c5106788` (21:18:42Z) — superseded by routing broadcast.
  - Director routing broadcast `20eb10fc` (21:29:54Z) — team-shape update + branch-fitness verdict + commit-discipline absorption.
  - Mistbound retirement-detection broadcast (21:57:22Z) — false-positive cured by Mistbound's self-correction at 21:58:49Z.
  - Pre-positioning Moment 1 broadcast `ced9997b` (22:01:38Z) — full Director-role explanation, team roster, slice state, 16 standing notes, 6 failure-mode captures, instrumentation handoff list.
  - Lunary Moment 2 broadcast (22:04:09Z) — authority transferred.
  - Heartbeat-end broadcast (22:04:42Z) — final tagged-`heartbeat` event; cron + watcher stopped.
- **Claims / queue / git state**: Zero active claims under Seaworthy identity (`6966d4`). Zero live commit-queue entries under Seaworthy identity. No claim disposition required.
- **Session complete announcement**: My session is standing down per owner direction *"run a session handoff in preparation for standing down"*. No further routing or comms from `6966d4` in this session.
- **Retained claims, if any, and handoff reason**: None retained. Director coordination does not open active-claims entries.
- **Pickup notification required for follow-on agent**: None — Lunary already broadcast Moment 2 receipt and has full inherited context from pre-positioning event `ced9997b`.
- **Heartbeat-end broadcast emitted**: yes (22:04:42Z, tag `heartbeat`).
- **Surprise or changed understanding** (handed forward for closeout consolidation):
  - The pre-compaction substrate bridge held the stale team-wide pause `e4f680c6` as inherited fact across one compaction-cycle. Owner had to correct at session re-open. Worth a structural-cure proposal: owner-directed states should carry an expiry or be reaffirmed before persisting across compaction.
  - False-positive retirement-detection at the 10-min threshold can fire on agents who are inside queue-management-between-cycles activity that is invisible to the heartbeat surface. The retirement-detection broadcast IS the cure (Mistbound saw it and re-grounded); the underlying gap is that the marshal-cycle contiguous-execution exemption doesn't cover queue-cleanup-between-cycles. Mistbound's named cure shape: explicit heartbeat at any post-cycle quiet window > 4 min.
  - Lunary's first team-start broadcast had identity confusion from a stale `/tmp/lunar-team-start.md`. **Second instance just observed (my own polluted closeout broadcast)** — same root cause. Cure shape needs to be a structural one, not an agent-by-agent recall: fresh-path-by-default for body-file paths, with the file-path tool surface itself enforcing freshness OR an opt-in to override.
  - The cheap-cure-exclusion + no-question-when-answer-is-forced rules must fire BEFORE menu construction at Director routing, not after. Worked this session in the 3-cycle-vs-16-cycle false menu I surfaced and the metacognition pass that retracted it.
- **Blockers or risks**:
  - Cycle 5 commit-msg gate failure (intent `9dc229c7` abandoned at 22:01:06Z; subject 105 chars > commitlint 100 char limit). Charcoal needs to re-author the subject under 100 chars; Mistbound runs marshal-cycle on the re-enqueue. This is the gating commit for the team-wide pause/stop trigger per owner direction.
  - Pelagic duplicate-heartbeat-burst pattern (~6-7s apart, observed 4+ times). Benign but worth a closeout note for codex-platform-specific heartbeat hygiene.
- **Handoff needed**: None to me. Lunary owns the wind-down per their own Moment 2 declaration: *"I will orchestrate the wind-down as Director after Moment 2"*. Mistbound + Charcoal + Pelagic continue on Cycle 5 + truth-repair until the team-wide pause trigger fires.

— Seaworthy Navigating Beacon / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / `6966d4`
(authoritative team-member closeout note for Lunary; supersedes the stale-body event in the comms stream immediately prior)
